title: hieracium viscosum subsp. africanum
intro: Hieracium viscosum subsp. africanum, commonly known as sticky hawk's beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as treating digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory ailments. The herbal preparations of Hieracium viscosum subsp. africanum typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
